2,"base-default-bet-multi-spin-conservation","10-spin balance conservation at default bet","base_game","critical","Run 10 spins at default bet $7.00 and verify the running balance ledger reconciles across all spins: ending wallet = balanceBefore - Σ betAmount + Σ winAmount. Catches off-by-one ledger errors in cascade/tumble aggregation (paytable: 'All wins are added to the player's balance after all tumbles resulted from a base spin have been played').","","10","7","{""coin"":0.35,""lines"":20,""totalBet"":7}","","0","7","[custom] all-spins-bet-equal-7 — Every spin has betAmount=7.00 (no bet drift between spins)
column2: check: collector.spins.length >= 1 && collector.spins.every(s => typeof s.betAmount === 'number' && Math.abs(s.betAmount - 7.00) <= 0.01)

column1: [custom] all-spins-win-valid-number — Every spin reports a finite non-negative winAmount
column2: check: collector.spins.every(s => typeof s.winAmount === 'number' && isFinite(s.winAmount) && s.winAmount >= 0)

column1: [custom] running-ledger-reconciles — Latest ending balance equals balanceBefore - ΣbetAmount + ΣwinAmount across all observed spins
column2: check: (() => { if (balanceBefore == null) return true; const ends = getRoundEndSpins(collector.spins); if (ends.length === 0) return true; const sumBet = ends.reduce((a, s) => a + (typeof s.betAmount === 'number' ? s.betAmount : 0), 0); const sumWin = ends.reduce((a, s) => a + (typeof s.winAmount === 'number' ? s.winAmount : 0), 0); const last = getCurrentBalance(collector); return last != null && Math.abs(last - (balanceBefore - sumBet + sumWin)) <= 0.01; })()

column1: [custom] per-spin-balance-arithmetic — Per-spin endingBalance = startingBalance - betAmount + winAmount (null-guarded for first spin)
[custom] unique-round-ids — Each round-end spin has a unique non-empty id
column2: check: (() => { const ends = getRoundEndSpins(collector.spins); const ids = ends.map(s => s.id).filter(x => typeof x === 'string' && x.length > 0); return ids.length === ends.length && new Set(ids).size === ids.length; })()

column1: [custom] ten-round-ends-recorded — At least 10 round-end frames captured (one per requested spin)
[custom] no-lost-spins-warnings — No debounce/blocked-click warnings indicating lost spins

column1: [custom] tumble-ledger-reconciles — Aggregate balance change equals -ΣbetAmount + ΣwinAmount across all round-ends
column2: check: (() => { if (balanceBefore == null) return true; const ends = getRoundEndSpins(collector.spins); const sumBet = ends.reduce((a, s) => a + (typeof s.betAmount === 'number' ? s.betAmount : 0), 0); const sumWin = ends.reduce((a, s) => a + (typeof s.winAmount === 'number' ? s.winAmount : 0), 0); const last = getCurrentBalance(collector); return last != null && Math.abs(last - (balanceBefore - sumBet + sumWin)) <= 0.01; })()
